section.heading: Acceptance of other lands by Secretary of the Interior

content.p: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept the donation of the following-described lands, which lands, upon acceptance by the United States, shall become a part of the national park:
Township 41 north, range 116 west: Section 3, lots 1 and 2.
Containing seventy-eight and ninety-three one-hundredths acres, more or less.

note.heading: Repeal of Inconsistent Laws
note.p: Repeal of laws inconsistent with act Sept. 14, 1950, see note set out under section 406d–1 of this title.
